evals.prompt: I've been getting a lot of notifications and feel like I'm missing important stuff. Can you check what action items are waiting for me?
evals.expected_output: Structured summary with urgent items first, showing Jira assignments, GitLab mentions, calendar responses needed, and other actionable emails from recent inbox

evals.prompt: check my pending items from the last few days - I think there were some Jira tickets assigned to me and maybe a merge request to review
evals.expected_output: Categorized list focusing on Jira assignments and GitLab notifications, with clear action items and priorities

evals.prompt: what needs my attention today? I saw some notifications but haven't had time to go through them
evals.expected_output: Today-focused summary of urgent and important items requiring immediate attention, with clear next steps
